title: Make task collection and media execution deterministic
forbidden_changes: Deleting failing tests instead of fixing behavior
deliverables: Serialized collection-store updates and atomic batch claims
Idempotent task retries and complete terminal events
Cancellable FFmpeg process trees without redundant audio extraction
Accurate audio and Provider capability contracts
acceptance_tests: Concurrent collection updates do not lose item state
Duplicate batch and retry requests create at most one active job
Terminal events expose note output and error details without manual refresh
Cancelling a task terminates its active FFmpeg process tree
Audio metrics use the declared sample rate
Task Center controls remain visible at the minimum supported window size
All default Rust tests and npm check pass
security_requirements: Task and collection corruption must remain visible
Media processes must be bounded and cancellable
Provider failures must not be converted to success
No source content or credentials may be added to progress events
